uxProblems.description: Low usability score predicts user confusion and task failure rates above 25%
High cognitive load will cause users to abandon complex tasks
Too many competing attention hotspots will reduce CTA conversion rate
Unclear visual hierarchy will cause users to miss key content
4 confusion signals will cause users to struggle with navigation

accessibilityFailures.description: Current accessibility score predicts WCAG 2.1 AA non-compliance
Color contrast violations will fail WCAG 1.4.3 (Contrast Minimum)
Missing ARIA labels will prevent screen reader navigation

responsiveFailures.description: Low responsiveness score predicts layout breakage on mobile devices
Mobile viewport has layout issues that will cause horizontal scroll or clipped content

confusionIssues.description: Low consistency score predicts users will be confused by varying visual language
Weak visual hierarchy means users will not know where to focus first
Poor aesthetics score correlates with reduced user trust and bounce rate increase
